1→package org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts
  2→
  3→import android.text.TextUtils
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.Lifecycle
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner
  6→import androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleRegistry
  7→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  8→import androidx.lifecycle.MediatorLiveData
  9→import androidx.lifecycle.Observer
 10→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
 11→import androidx.paging.PagedList
 12→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
 13→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
 14→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
 15→import kotlinx.coroutines.isActive
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.LocalOrRemoteId.LocalId
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.list.AuthorFilter
 20→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.list.AuthorFilter.Everyone
 21→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.list.AuthorFilter.SpecificAuthor
 22→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.list.ListOrder
 23→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.list.PagedListWrapper
 24→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.list.PostListDescriptor
 25→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.list.PostListDescriptor.PostListDescriptorForRestSite
 26→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.list.PostListDescriptor.PostListDescriptorForXmlRpcSite
 27→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.AccountStore
 28→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.ListStore
 29→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore
 30→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 31→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.AuthorFilterSelection
 33→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.AuthorFilterSelection.EVERYONE
 34→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.AuthorFilterSelection.ME
 35→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListType.SCHEDULED
 36→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListType.SEARCH
 37→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostUtils
 38→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.trackPostListAction
 39→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils.ReaderUtilsWrapper
 40→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadStarter
 41→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadUtilsWrapper
 42→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 43→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 44→import org.wordpress.android.util.SiteUtils
 45→import org.wordpress.android.util.ThrottleLiveData
 46→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ScopedViewModel
 47→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.SingleLiveEvent
 48→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.helpers.ConnectionStatus
 49→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListEmptyUiState.RefreshError
 50→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemIdentifier.LocalPostId
 51→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemType.PostListItemUiState
 52→import javax.inject.Inject
 53→import javax.inject.Named
 54→import kotlin.properties.Delegates
 55→
 56→typealias PagedPostList = PagedList<PostListItemType>
 57→
 58→private const val SEARCH_DELAY_MS = 500L
 59→private const val SEARCH_PROGRESS_INDICATOR_DELAY_MS = 500L
 60→private const val EMPTY_VIEW_THROTTLE = 250L
 61→
 62→class PostListViewModel @Inject constructor(
 63→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 64→    private val listStore: ListStore,
 65→    private val postStore: PostStore,
 66→    private val accountStore: AccountStore,
 67→    private val listItemUiStateHelper: PostListItemUiStateHelper,
 68→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 69→    private val uploadStarter: UploadStarter,
 70→    private val readerUtilsWrapper: ReaderUtilsWrapper,
 71→    private val uploadUtilsWrapper: UploadUtilsWrapper,
 72→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val uiDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 73→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 74→    connectionStatus: LiveData<ConnectionStatus>
 75→) : ScopedViewModel(uiDispatcher) {
 76→    private val isStatsSupported: Boolean by lazy {
 77→        SiteUtils.isAccessedViaWPComRest(connector.site) && connector.site.hasCapabilityViewStats
 78→    }
 79→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {
 80→        connector.site.isWPCom &&
 81→                connector.site.hasCapabilityEditOthersPosts &&
 82→                !connector.site.isSingleUserSite
 83→    }
 84→    private var isStarted: Boolean = false
 85→    private lateinit var connector: PostListViewModelConnector
 86→
 87→    private var photonWidth by Delegates.notNull<Int>()
 88→    private var photonHeight by Delegates.notNull<Int>()
 89→
 90→    private var scrollToLocalPostId: LocalPostId? = null
 91→
 92→    private val _scrollToPosition = SingleLiveEvent<Int>()
 93→    val scrollToPosition: LiveData<Int> = _scrollToPosition
 94→
 95→    private val dataSource: PostListItemDataSource by lazy {
 96→        PostListItemDataSource(
 97→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
 98→            postStore = postStore,
 99→            postFetcher = connector.postFetcher,
100→            transform = this::transformPostModelToPostListItemUiState
101→        )
102→    }
103→
104→    private var pagedListWrapper: PagedListWrapper<PostListItemType>? = null
105→
106→    private val _pagedListData = MediatorLiveData<PagedPostList>()
107→    val pagedListData: LiveData<PagedPostList> = _pagedListData
108→
109→    private val _emptyViewState = ThrottleLiveData<PostListEmptyUiState>(
110→        offset = EMPTY_VIEW_THROTTLE,
111→        coroutineScope = viewModelScope,
112→        mainDispatcher = uiDispatcher,
113→        backgroundDispatcher = bgDispatcher
114→    )
115→    val emptyViewState: LiveData<PostListEmptyUiState> = _emptyViewState
116→
117→    private val _isLoadingMore = MediatorLiveData<Boolean>()
118→    val isLoadingMore: LiveData<Boolean> = _isLoadingMore
119→
120→    private val _isFetchingFirstPage = MediatorLiveData<Boolean>()
121→    val isFetchingFirstPage: LiveData<Boolean> = _isFetchingFirstPage
122→
123→    private var searchQuery: String? = null
124→    private var searchJob: Job? = null
125→    private var searchProgressJob: Job? = null
126→    private lateinit var authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection
127→
128→    private val lifecycleOwner = object : LifecycleOwner {
129→        val lifecycleRegistry = LifecycleRegistry(this)
130→        override val lifecycle: Lifecycle = lifecycleRegistry
131→    }
132→
133→    fun start(
134→        postListViewModelConnector: PostListViewModelConnector,
135→        value: AuthorFilterSelection,
136→        photonWidth: Int,
137→        photonHeight: Int
138→    ) {
139→        if (isStarted) {
140→            return
141→        }
142→        this.photonHeight = photonHeight
143→        this.photonWidth = photonWidth
144→        connector = postListViewModelConnector
145→
146→        isStarted = true
147→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED
148→
149→        if (connector.postListType == SEARCH) {
150→            this.authorFilterSelection = EVERYONE
151→        } else {
152→            this.authorFilterSelection = value
153→            /*
154→             * We don't want to initialize the list with empty search query in search mode as it'd send an unnecessary
155→             * request to fetch ids of all posts on the site.
156→             */
157→            initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
158→        }
159→    }
160→
161→    private fun initList(dataSource: PostListItemDataSource, lifecycle: Lifecycle) {
162→        val listDescriptor: PostListDescriptor = initListDescriptor(searchQuery)
163→
164→        clearLiveDataSources()
165→
166→        val pagedListWrapper = listStore.getList(listDescriptor, dataSource, lifecycle)
167→
168→        listenToEmptyViewStateLiveData(pagedListWrapper)
169→
170→        _pagedListData.addSource(pagedListWrapper.data) { pagedPostList ->
171→            pagedPostList?.let {
172→                if (isSearchResultDeliverable()) {
173→                    onDataUpdated(it)
174→                    _pagedListData.value = it
175→                }
176→            }
177→        }
178→        _isFetchingFirstPage.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage) {
179→            searchProgressJob?.cancel()
180→            if (it == true) {
181→                val delay = if (connector.postListType != SEARCH) {
182→                    0
183→                } else {
184→                    SEARCH_PROGRESS_INDICATOR_DELAY_MS
185→                }
186→                searchProgressJob = launch {
187→                    delay(delay)
188→                    searchProgressJob = null
189→                    if (isActive) {
190→                        _isFetchingFirstPage.value = true
191→                    }
192→                }
193→            } else {
194→                _isFetchingFirstPage.value = false
195→            }
196→        }
197→        _isLoadingMore.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isLoadingMore) {
198→            _isLoadingMore.value = it
199→        }
200→
201→        this.pagedListWrapper = pagedListWrapper
202→        fetchFirstPage()
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun clearLiveDataSources() {
206→        pagedListWrapper?.let {
207→            _pagedListData.removeSource(it.data)
208→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(pagedListData)
209→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.isEmpty)
210→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.isFetchingFirstPage)
211→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.listError)
212→            _isFetchingFirstPage.removeSource(it.isFetchingFirstPage)
213→            _isLoadingMore.removeSource(it.isLoadingMore)
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun initListDescriptor(searchQuery: String?): PostListDescriptor {
218→        return if (connector.site.isUsingWpComRestApi) {
219→            val author: AuthorFilter = when (authorFilterSelection) {
220→                ME -> SpecificAuthor(accountStore.account.userId)
221→                EVERYONE -> Everyone
222→            }
223→
224→            PostListDescriptorForRestSite(
225→                site = connector.site,
226→                statusList = connector.postListType.postStatuses,
227→                author = author,
228→                searchQuery = searchQuery,
229→                order = if (connector.postListType == SCHEDULED) ListOrder.ASC else ListOrder.DESC
230→            )
231→        } else {
232→            PostListDescriptorForXmlRpcSite(
233→                site = connector.site,
234→                statusList = connector.postListType.postStatuses,
235→                searchQuery = searchQuery,
236→                order = if (connector.postListType == SCHEDULED) ListOrder.ASC else ListOrder.DESC
237→            )
238→        }
239→    }
240→
241→    private fun listenToEmptyViewStateLiveData(pagedListWrapper: PagedListWrapper<PostListItemType>) {
242→        val update = {
243→            createEmptyUiState(
244→                postListType = connector.postListType,
245→                isNetworkAvailable = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable(),
246→                isLoadingData = pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage.value ?: false ||
247→                        pagedListWrapper.data.value == null,
248→                isListEmpty = pagedListWrapper.isEmpty.value ?: true,
249→                isSearchPromptRequired = isEmptySearch(),
250→                error = pagedListWrapper.listError.value,
251→                fetchFirstPage = this::fetchFirstPage,
252→                newPost = connector.postActionHandler::newPost
253→            )
254→        }
255→
256→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isEmpty) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
257→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
258→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.listError) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
259→    }
260→
261→    // used to filter out dataset changes that might trigger empty view when performing search
262→    private fun isSearchResultDeliverable(): Boolean {
263→        return connector.postListType != SEARCH ||
264→                (connector.postListType == SEARCH &&
265→                        pagedListWrapper?.isFetchingFirstPage?.value != null &&
266→                        isFetchingFirstPage.value == false)
267→    }
268→
269→    private fun isEmptySearch(): Boolean {
270→        return TextUtils.isEmpty(searchQuery) && connector.postListType == SEARCH
271→    }
272→
273→    init {
274→        connectionStatus.observe(lifecycleOwner, Observer {
275→            retryOnConnectionAvailableAfterRefreshError()
276→        })
277→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.CREATED
278→    }
279→
280→    fun search(query: String?, delay: Long = SEARCH_DELAY_MS) {
281→        if (searchQuery == query) {
282→            return
283→        }
284→        searchJob?.cancel()
285→        searchProgressJob?.cancel()
286→        searchQuery = query
287→        if (TextUtils.isEmpty(query)) {
288→            clearLiveDataSources()
289→            pagedListWrapper = null
290→            _isFetchingFirstPage.value = false
291→            showEmptySearchPrompt()
292→        } else {
293→            searchJob = launch {
294→                delay(delay)
295→                searchJob = null
296→                if (isActive) {
297→                    initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
298→                }
299→            }
300→        }
301→    }
302→
303→    private fun showEmptySearchPrompt() {
304→        _emptyViewState.value = createEmptyUiState(
305→            postListType = SEARCH,
306→            isNetworkAvailable = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable(),
307→            isLoadingData = false,
308→            isListEmpty = true,
309→            isSearchPromptRequired = true,
310→            error = null,
311→            fetchFirstPage = this@PostListViewModel::fetchFirstPage,
312→            newPost = connector.postActionHandler::newPost
313→        )
314→    }
315→
316→    override fun onCleared() {
317→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.DESTROYED
318→        super.onCleared()
319→    }
320→
321→    // Public Methods
322→
323→    fun swipeToRefresh() {
324→        uploadStarter.queueUploadFromSite(connector.site)
325→        fetchFirstPage()
326→    }
327→
328→    fun scrollToPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
329→        val data = pagedListData.value
330→        if (data != null) {
331→            updateScrollPosition(data, localPostId)
332→        } else {
333→            // store the target post id and scroll there when the data is loaded
334→            scrollToLocalPostId = localPostId
335→        }
336→    }
337→
338→    // Utils
339→
340→    private fun fetchFirstPage() {
341→        pagedListWrapper?.fetchFirstPage()
342→    }
343→
344→    private fun onDataUpdated(data: PagedPostList) {
345→        val localPostId = scrollToLocalPostId
346→        if (localPostId != null) {
347→            scrollToLocalPostId = null
348→            updateScrollPosition(data, localPostId)
349→        }
350→    }
351→
352→    private fun updateScrollPosition(data: PagedPostList, localPostId: LocalPostId) {
353→        val position = findItemListPosition(data, localPostId)
354→        position?.let {
355→            _scrollToPosition.value = it
356→        } ?: AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, "ScrollToPost failed - the post not found.")
357→    }
358→
359→    private fun findItemListPosition(data: PagedPostList, localPostId: LocalPostId): Int? {
360→        return data.listIterator().withIndex().asSequence().find { listItem ->
361→            if (listItem.value is PostListItemUiState) {
362→                (listItem.value as PostListItemUiState).data.localPostId == localPostId
363→            } else {
364→                false
365→            }
366→        }?.index
367→    }
368→
369→    private fun transformPostModelToPostListItemUiState(post: PostModel): PostListItemUiState {
370→        val hasAutoSave = connector.hasAutoSave(post)
371→        return listItemUiStateHelper.createPostListItemUiState(
372→            authorFilterSelection,
373→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported,
374→            post = post,
375→            site = connector.site,
376→            unhandledConflicts = connector.doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict(post),
377→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave,
378→            capabilitiesToPublish = uploadUtilsWrapper.userCanPublish(connector.site),
379→            statsSupported = isStatsSupported,
380→            featuredImageUrl =
381→            convertToPhotonUrlIfPossible(connector.getFeaturedImageUrl(post.featuredImageId)),
382→            formattedDate = PostUtils.getFormattedDate(post),
383→            performingCriticalAction = connector.postActionHandler.isPerformingCriticalAction(LocalId(post.id)),
384→            onAction = { postModel, buttonType, statEvent ->
385→                trackPostListAction(connector.site, buttonType, postModel, statEvent)
386→                connector.postActionHandler.handlePostButton(buttonType, postModel, hasAutoSave)
387→            },
388→            uploadStatusTracker = connector.uploadStatusTracker,
389→            isSearch = connector.postListType == SEARCH
390→        )
391→    }
392→
393→    private fun retryOnConnectionAvailableAfterRefreshError() {
394→        val connectionAvailableAfterRefreshError = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable() &&
395→                emptyViewState.value is RefreshError
396→
397→        if (connectionAvailableAfterRefreshError) {
398→            fetchFirstPage()
399→        }
400→    }
401→
402→    private fun convertToPhotonUrlIfPossible(featuredImageUrl: String?): String? =
403→        readerUtilsWrapper.getResizedImageUrl(
404→            featuredImageUrl,
405→            photonWidth,
406→            photonHeight,
407→            SiteUtils.getAccessibilityInfoFromSite(connector.site)
408→        )
409→
410→    fun updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection): Boolean {
411→        if (connector.postListType != SEARCH && this.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
412→            this.authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection
413→            initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
414→            return true
415→        }
416→        return false
417→    }
418→}
419→

conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages
  2→
  3→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteHomepageSettings.ShowOnFront
  4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action
  6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD
  7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.COPY
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.COPY_LINK
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.DELETE_PERMANENTLY
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.MOVE_TO_DRAFT
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.MOVE_TO_TRASH
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.PUBLISH_NOW
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.SET_AS_HOMEPAGE
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.SET_AS_POSTS_PAGE
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.SET_PARENT
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.VIEW_PAGE
 18→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType
 19→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType.DRAFTS
 20→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType.PUBLISHED
 21→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType.SCHEDULED
 22→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType.TRASHED
 23→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase.PostUploadUiState
 24→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase.PostUploadUiState.UploadFailed
 25→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase.PostUploadUiState.UploadWaitingForConnection
 26→import javax.inject.Inject
 27→
 28→class CreatePageListItemActionsUseCase @Inject constructor() {
 29→    @SuppressWarnings("ReturnCount")
 30→    fun setupPageActions(
 31→        listType: PageListType,
 32→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
 33→        siteModel: SiteModel,
 34→        remoteId: Long,
 35→        isPageEligibleForBlaze: Boolean = false
 36→    ): Set<Action> {
 37→        return when (listType) {
 38→            SCHEDULED -> return getScheduledPageActions(uploadUiState)
 39→            PUBLISHED -> return getPublishedPageActions(
 40→                siteModel,
 41→                remoteId,
 42→                listType,
 43→                uploadUiState,
 44→                isPageEligibleForBlaze
 45→            )
 46→            DRAFTS -> getDraftsPageActions(uploadUiState)
 47→            TRASHED -> setOf(MOVE_TO_DRAFT, DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
 48→        }
 49→    }
 50→
 51→    private fun getScheduledPageActions(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState): MutableSet<Action> {
 52→        return mutableSetOf(
 53→            VIEW_PAGE,
 54→            SET_PARENT,
 55→            COPY_LINK,
 56→            MOVE_TO_DRAFT,
 57→            MOVE_TO_TRASH
 58→        ).apply {
 59→            if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload(uploadUiState)) {
 60→                add(CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD)
 61→            }
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun canCancelPendingAutoUpload(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState) =
 66→        (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
 67→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
 68→
 69→    private fun getPublishedPageActions(
 70→        siteModel: SiteModel,
 71→        remoteId: Long,
 72→        listType: PageListType,
 73→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
 74→        isPageEligibleForBlaze: Boolean
 75→    ): MutableSet<Action> {
 76→        return mutableSetOf(
 77→            VIEW_PAGE,
 78→            COPY,
 79→            COPY_LINK,
 80→            SET_PARENT
 81→        ).apply {
 82→            if (siteModel.isUsingWpComRestApi &&
 83→                siteModel.showOnFront == ShowOnFront.PAGE.value &&
 84→                remoteId > 0
 85→            ) {
 86→                if (siteModel.pageOnFront != remoteId) {
 87→                    add(SET_AS_HOMEPAGE)
 88→                }
 89→                if (siteModel.pageForPosts != remoteId) {
 90→                    add(SET_AS_POSTS_PAGE)
 91→                }
 92→            }
 93→
 94→            if (siteModel.pageOnFront != remoteId && listType == PUBLISHED) {
 95→                add(MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
 96→                add(MOVE_TO_TRASH)
 97→            }
 98→
 99→            if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload(uploadUiState)) {
100→                add(CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD)
101→            }
102→
103→            if (isPageEligibleForBlaze) {
104→                add(PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
105→            }
106→        }
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun getDraftsPageActions(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState): MutableSet<Action> {
110→        return mutableSetOf(VIEW_PAGE, SET_PARENT, PUBLISH_NOW, MOVE_TO_TRASH, COPY, COPY_LINK).apply {
111→            if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload(uploadUiState)) {
112→                add(CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD)
113→            }
114→        }
115→    }
116→}
117→

function.name: edit
function.arguments:
{"old_string":"    fun createPostListItemUiState(
        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
        post: PostModel,
        site: SiteModel,
        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
        statsSupported: Boolean,
        featuredImageUrl: String?,
        formattedDate: String,
        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
        isSearch: Boolean,
        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
    ): PostListItemUiState {
        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)

        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
        }
        val buttonTypes = createButtonTypes(
            postStatus = postStatus,
            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
            statsSupported = statsSupported,
            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
                site,
                postStatus,
                post
            ),
        )
        // val defaultActions = createDefaultViewActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
        val moreActions = createMoreActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
","new_string":"    fun createPostListItemUiState(
        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
        post: PostModel,
        site: SiteModel,
        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
        statsSupported: Boolean,
        featuredImageUrl: String?,
        formattedDate: String,
        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
        isSearch: Boolean,
        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
        postListType: PostListType,
        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
    ): PostListItemUiState {
        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)

        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
        }
        val moreActions = createMoreActions(
            postStatus = postStatus,
            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
            statsSupported = statsSupported,
            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
                site,
                postStatus,
                post
            ),
            postListType = postListType,
            onButtonClicked = onButtonClicked
        )
","file_path":"WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/viewmodel/posts/PostListItemUiStateHelper.kt"}

394→    private fun retryOnConnectionAvailableAfterRefreshError() {

396→                emptyViewState.value is RefreshError
397→

412→        if (connector.postListType != SEARCH && this.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
413→            this.authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection
414→            initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
415→            return true
416→        }
417→        return false
418→    }

70→ * Helper class which encapsulates logic for creating UiStates for items in the PostsList.
 71→ */
 72→class PostListItemUiStateHelper @Inject constructor(
 73→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 74→    private val uploadUiStateUseCase: PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase,
 75→    private val labelColorUseCase: PostPageListLabelColorUseCase,
 76→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
 77→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 78→) {
 79→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "LongMethod")
 80→    fun createPostListItemUiState(
 81→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
 82→        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
 83→        post: PostModel,
 84→        site: SiteModel,
 85→        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
 86→        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
 87→        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
 88→        statsSupported: Boolean,
 89→        featuredImageUrl: String?,
 90→        formattedDate: String,
 91→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
 92→        isSearch: Boolean,
 93→        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
 94→        postListType: PostListType,
 95→        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
 96→    ): PostListItemUiState {
 97→        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
 98→        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)
 99→
100→        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
101→            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
102→        }
103→        val moreActions = createMoreActions(
104→            postStatus = postStatus,
105→            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
106→            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
107→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
108→            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
109→            statsSupported = statsSupported,
110→            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
111→            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
112→            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
113→                site,
114→                postStatus,
115→                post
116→            ),
117→            postListType = postListType,
118→            onButtonClicked = onButtonClicked
119→        )
120→
121→        val remotePostId = RemotePostId(RemoteId(post.remotePostId))
122→        val localPostId = LocalPostId(LocalId(post.id))
123→        val baseTitle = getTitle(post = post)
124→        val excerpt = getExcerpt(post = post)
125→
126→        val title =
127→            if (baseTitle == UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses) && excerpt != null) null else baseTitle
128→
129→        val postInfo = getPostInfoLabels(
130→            postStatus,
131→            formattedDate,
132→            post.authorDisplayName,
133→            authorFilterSelection,
134→            isSearch,
135→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported
136→        )
137→        val statuses = getStatuses(
138→            postStatus = postStatus,
139→            post = post,
140→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
141→            hasUnhandledConflicts = unhandledConflicts,
142→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave
143→        )
144→        val statusesColor = labelColorUseCase.getLabelsColor(post, uploadUiState, unhandledConflicts, hasAutoSave)
145→        val statusesDelimiter = UiStringRes(R.string.multiple_status_label_delimiter)
146→        val onSelected = {
147→            when (postStatus) {
148→                TRASHED -> {
149→                    onAction.invoke(
150→                        post,
151→                        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG,
152→                        POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
153→                    )
154→                }
155→
156→                UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED, DRAFT, PRIVATE, PENDING, SCHEDULED -> onAction.invoke(
157→                    post,
158→                    BUTTON_EDIT,
159→                    POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
160→                )
161→            }
162→        }
163→        val itemUiData = PostListItemUiStateData(
164→            remotePostId = remotePostId,
165→            localPostId = localPostId,
166→            title = title,
167→            excerpt = excerpt,
168→            imageUrl = featuredImageUrl,
169→            postInfo = postInfo,
170→            statuses = statuses,
171→            statusesColor = statusesColor,
172→            statusesDelimiter = statusesDelimiter,
173→            progressBarUiState = getProgressBarState(
174→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
175→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
176→            ),
177→            showOverlay = shouldShowOverlay(
178→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
179→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
180→            ),
181→            disableRippleEffect = postStatus == TRASHED
182→        )
183→
184→        return PostListItemUiState(
185→            data = itemUiData,
186→            moreActions = moreActions,
187→            onSelected = onSelected
188→        )
189→    }

content.text:
I have updated the post list context menus to modernization standards by implementing grouping, new ordering, and ensuring the use of modernized icons and copy.

### Key Changes:
1.  **Grouping and Ordering**: 
    *   Modified `PostListItemUiStateHelper` to take `PostListType` (the current tab) into account when creating actions.
    *   Implemented a new grouping logic in `createMoreActions`, categorizing actions into Primary (View/Edit), Secondary (Duplicate/Promote), and Destructive (Trash/Delete) groups.
    *   Customized the order and grouping for each tab (Published, Drafts, Scheduled, Trashed) to highlight the most relevant actions (e.g., Stats at the top for Published posts).
2.  **UI Implementation**:
    *   Updated `PostListItemType.kt` to include a `groupId` for actions.
    *   Modified `PostListItemViewHolder.kt` to use the `groupId` when building the `PopupMenu` and enabled group dividers using `MenuCompat.setGroupDividerEnabled`.
3.  **Modernization**:
    *   Ensured that existing visibility rules are preserved while applying the new layout.
    *   Confirmed the use of `gb_ic_` (Gutenberg) icons across all actions where available.
    *   Consolidated action creation logic in `PostListItemUiStateHelper` for better maintainability.

### Verification:
*   Checked that all previously available actions are still present and correctly handled in `PostActionHandler`.
*   Verified that the `PostListViewModel` correctly passes the `PostListType` to the UI state helper.
*   Confirmed that no linter errors were introduced in the modified files.

🤖 Generated with [Firebender](https://firebender.com)

Co-Authored-By: Firebender <help@firebender.com>

 68→/**
 69→ * Helper class which encapsulates logic for creating UiStates for items in the PostsList.
 70→ */
 71→class PostListItemUiStateHelper @Inject constructor(
 72→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 73→    private val uploadUiStateUseCase: PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase,
 74→    private val labelColorUseCase: PostPageListLabelColorUseCase,
 75→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
 76→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 77→) {
 78→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "LongMethod")
 79→    fun createPostListItemUiState(
 80→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
 81→        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
 82→        post: PostModel,
 83→        site: SiteModel,
 84→        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
 85→        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
 86→        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
 87→        statsSupported: Boolean,
 88→        featuredImageUrl: String?,
 89→        formattedDate: String,
 90→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
 91→        isSearch: Boolean,
 92→        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
 93→        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
 94→    ): PostListItemUiState {
 95→        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
 96→        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)
 97→
 98→        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
 99→            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
100→        }
101→        val buttonTypes = createButtonTypes(
102→            postStatus = postStatus,
103→            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
104→            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
105→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
106→            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
107→            statsSupported = statsSupported,
108→            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
109→            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
110→            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
111→                site,
112→                postStatus,
113→                post
114→            ),
115→        )
116→        // val defaultActions = createDefaultViewActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
117→        val moreActions = createMoreActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
118→
119→        val remotePostId = RemotePostId(RemoteId(post.remotePostId))
120→        val localPostId = LocalPostId(LocalId(post.id))
121→        val baseTitle = getTitle(post = post)
122→        val excerpt = getExcerpt(post = post)
123→
124→        val title =
125→            if (baseTitle == UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses) && excerpt != null) null else baseTitle
126→
127→        val postInfo = getPostInfoLabels(
128→            postStatus,
129→            formattedDate,
130→            post.authorDisplayName,
131→            authorFilterSelection,
132→            isSearch,
133→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported
134→        )
135→        val statuses = getStatuses(
136→            postStatus = postStatus,
137→            post = post,
138→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
139→            hasUnhandledConflicts = unhandledConflicts,
140→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave
141→        )
142→        val statusesColor = labelColorUseCase.getLabelsColor(post, uploadUiState, unhandledConflicts, hasAutoSave)
143→        val statusesDelimiter = UiStringRes(R.string.multiple_status_label_delimiter)
144→        val onSelected = {
145→            when (postStatus) {
146→                TRASHED -> {
147→                    onAction.invoke(
148→                        post,
149→                        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG,
150→                        POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
151→                    )
152→                }
153→
154→                UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED, DRAFT, PRIVATE, PENDING, SCHEDULED -> onAction.invoke(
155→                    post,
156→                    BUTTON_EDIT,
157→                    POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
158→                )
159→            }
160→        }
161→        val itemUiData = PostListItemUiStateData(
162→            remotePostId = remotePostId,
163→            localPostId = localPostId,
164→            title = title,
165→            excerpt = excerpt,
166→            imageUrl = featuredImageUrl,
167→            postInfo = postInfo,
168→            statuses = statuses,
169→            statusesColor = statusesColor,
170→            statusesDelimiter = statusesDelimiter,
171→            progressBarUiState = getProgressBarState(
172→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
173→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
174→            ),
175→            showOverlay = shouldShowOverlay(
176→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
177→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
178→            ),
179→            disableRippleEffect = postStatus == TRASHED
180→        )
181→
182→        return PostListItemUiState(
183→            data = itemUiData,
184→            moreActions = moreActions,
185→            onSelected = onSelected
186→        )
187→    }
188→
189→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
190→    private fun getPostInfoLabels(
191→        postStatus: PostStatus,
192→        formattedDate: String,
193→        displayName: String?,
194→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
195→        isSearch: Boolean,
196→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean
197→    ): List<UiString> {
198→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
199→
200→        if (isSearch) {
201→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
202→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
203→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
204→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
205→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
206→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
207→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
208→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
209→            }
210→            uiStrings.add(UiStringRes(postStatusText))
211→        }
212→
213→        if (formattedDate.isNotBlank()) {
214→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(formattedDate))
215→        }
216→        if (isAuthorFilterVisible && authorFilterSelection == EVERYONE && !displayName.isNullOrBlank()) {
217→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(displayName))
218→        }
219→        return uiStrings
220→    }
221→
222→    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
223→        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
224→            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })
225→        } else UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
226→    }
227→
228→    private fun getExcerpt(post: PostModel): UiString? =
229→        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
230→            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
231→            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
232→            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
233→            ?.let { UiStringText(getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(it)) }
234→    private fun getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(input: String): String {
235→        val parts = input.split(Regex("\\s+\\n+"))
236→        return parts.first()
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun getProgressBarState(
240→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
241→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean
242→    ): ProgressBarUiState {
243→        return if (shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState, performingCriticalAction)) {
244→            if (uploadUiState is UploadingMedia) {
245→                ProgressBarUiState.Determinate(uploadUiState.progress)
246→            } else {
247→                ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate
248→            }
249→        } else {
250→            ProgressBarUiState.Hidden
251→        }
252→    }
253→
254→    private fun shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
255→        return performingCriticalAction || uploadUiState is UploadingPost || uploadUiState is UploadingMedia ||
256→                uploadUiState is UploadQueued
257→    }
258→
259→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
260→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
261→        postStatus: PostStatus,
262→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
263→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
264→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
265→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
266→        when {
267→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
268→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
269→            }
270→
271→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
272→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
273→            } else {
274→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
275→            }
276→
277→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
278→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
280→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
281→                    labels.add(it)
282→                }
283→            }
284→
285→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
286→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
287→        }
288→        return labels
289→    }
290→
291→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
292→        return when (postStatus) {
293→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
294→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
295→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
296→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
297→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
298→            TRASHED -> {
299→                AppLog.e(
300→                    POSTS,
301→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
302→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
303→                )
304→                return null
305→            }
306→        }
307→    }
308→
309→    private fun getStatuses(
310→        postStatus: PostStatus,
311→        post: PostModel,
312→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
313→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
314→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
315→    ): List<UiString> {
316→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
317→            uploadUiState,
318→            postStatus,
319→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
320→            hasAutoSave
321→        )
322→
323→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
324→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
325→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
326→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
327→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
328→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
329→            }
330→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
331→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
332→            }
333→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
334→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
335→            }
336→            if (post.sticky) {
337→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
338→            }
339→        }
340→        return labels
341→    }
342→
343→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {
344→        return when {
345→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
346→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
347→                postStatus,
348→                false,
349→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
350→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload
351→            )
352→
353→            else -> {
354→                val errorMsg = "MediaError and postError are both null."
355→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
356→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
357→                } else {
358→                    AppLog.e(POSTS, errorMsg)
359→                }
360→                UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic)
361→            }
362→        }
363→    }
364→
365→    private fun getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiStringRes {
366→        return when {
367→            uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload -> when (postStatus) {
368→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
369→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)
370→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled_retrying)
371→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted_retrying)
372→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic_error_retrying)
373→            }
374→
375→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
376→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
377→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
378→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)
379→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted)
380→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
381→            }
382→
383→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
384→        }
385→    }
386→
387→    private fun shouldShowOverlay(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
388→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
389→        return performingCriticalAction ||
390→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
391→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))
392→    }
393→
394→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
395→    private fun createButtonTypes(
396→        postStatus: PostStatus,
397→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401→        statsSupported: Boolean,
402→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411→
412→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414→                !isLocalDraft &&
415→                !isLocallyChanged &&
416→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422→
423→        if (postStatus != TRASHED) {
424→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_EDIT)
425→        }
426→
427→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
428→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
429→        }
430→
431→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
432→            buttonTypes.add(
433→                when {
434→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
435→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
436→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
437→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
438→                }
439→            )
440→        }
441→
442→        if (canShowViewButton) {
443→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
444→        }
445→
446→        if (canShowStats) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
448→        }
449→
450→        if (canShowCopy) {
451→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
452→        }
453→
454→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
455→
456→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
457→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
458→        }
459→
460→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
461→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
462→        }
463→
464→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
465→
466→        return buttonTypes
467→    }
468→
469→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
470→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
471→    }
472→
473→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(
474→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
475→        postStatus: PostStatus
476→    ) {
477→        when {
478→            isLocalDraft -> add(BUTTON_DELETE)
479→            postStatus == TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
480→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
481→        }
482→    }
483→
484→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
485→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED
486→
487→        if (canMovePostToDraft) {
488→            add(BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
489→        }
490→    }
491→
492→    private fun createMoreActions(
493→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
494→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
495→    ): PostListItemAction.MoreItem {
496→        val allItems = buttonTypes.map { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
497→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
498→        }
499→        return PostListItemAction.MoreItem(allItems, onButtonClicked)
500→    }
501→}

  4→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity

  6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.push.NativeNotificationsUtils
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.PagePostCreationSourcesDetail.POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFeatureUtils
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFlowSource
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.photopicker.MediaPickerLauncher
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.RemotePreviewLogicHelper.RemotePreviewType
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefs
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stories.intro.StoriesIntroDialogFragment
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadService
 18→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 19→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.clipboardManager
 20→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.helpers.ToastMessageHolder
 21→
 22→sealed class PostListAction {
 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()
 25→    class NewStoryPost(val site: SiteModel) : PostListAction()
 26→    class PreviewPost(
 27→        val site: SiteModel,
 28→        val post: PostModel,
 29→        val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 30→        val showToast: (ToastMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 31→        val messageMediaUploading: ToastMessageHolder
 32→    ) : PostListAction()
 33→
 34→    class RemotePreviewPost(
 35→        val site: SiteModel,
 36→        val post: PostModel,
 37→        val remotePreviewType: RemotePreviewType
 38→    ) : PostListAction()
 39→
 40→    class RetryUpload(
 41→        val post: PostModel,
 42→        val trackAnalytics: Boolean = PostUtils.isFirstTimePublish(post)
 43→    ) : PostListAction()
 44→
 45→    class CopyUrl(
 46→        val site: SiteModel,
 47→        val post: PostModel,
 48→        val showSnackbar: (SnackbarMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()
 52→
 53→    class ViewStats(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 54→    class ViewPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 55→    class DismissPendingNotification(val pushId: Int) : PostListAction()
 56→
 57→    class ShowPromoteWithBlaze(val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 58→}
 59→
 60→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61→fun handlePostListAction(
 62→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63→    action: PostListAction,
 64→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68→) {
 69→    when (action) {
 70→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72→        }
 73→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75→        }
 76→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80→            } else {
 81→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87→                activity = activity,
 88→                site = action.site,
 89→                post = action.post,
 90→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95→        }
 96→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99→                activity,
100→                action.post,
101→                action.trackAnalytics
102→            )
103→            activity.startService(intent)
104→        }
105→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107→        }
108→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110→        }
111→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113→        }
114→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119→            try {
120→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123→
124→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125→            } catch (e: Exception) {
126→                /**
127→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129→                 */
130→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132→            }
133→        }
134→    }
135→}
136→

 35→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemAction
 36→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemType.PostListItemUiState
 37→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemUiStateData
 38→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.uistate.ProgressBarUiState
 39→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
 40→import android.R as AndroidR
 41→
 42→const val POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING = 8
 43→const val MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES = 2
 44→
 45→sealed class PostListItemViewHolder(
 46→    @LayoutRes layout: Int,
 47→    parent: ViewGroup,
 48→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
 49→    private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 50→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 51→    private val featuredImageView: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.image_featured)
 52→    private val titleTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.title)
 53→    private val postInfoTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.post_info)
 54→    private val statusesTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.statuses_label)
 55→    private val uploadProgressBar: ProgressBar = itemView.findViewById(R.id.upload_progress)
 56→    private val disabledOverlay: FrameLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.disabled_overlay)
 57→    private val container: ConstraintLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.container)
 58→    private val excerptTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.excerpt)
 59→    private val moreButton: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.more)
 60→
 61→    private val selectableBackground: Drawable? = parent.context.getDrawableFromAttribute(
 62→        AndroidR.attr.selectableItemBackground
 63→    )
 64→
 65→    private val noTitle = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
 66→    /**
 67→     * Url of an image loaded in the `featuredImageView`.
 68→     */
 69→    private var loadedFeaturedImgUrl: String? = null
 70→
 71→    companion object {
 72→        var isClickEnabled = AtomicBoolean(true)
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    abstract fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState)
 76→
 77→    class Standard(
 78→        parent: ViewGroup,
 79→        imageManager: ImageManager,
 80→        uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 81→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
 82→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
 83→            setBasicValues(item.data)
 84→            setMoreActions(item.moreActions.actions)
 85→
 86→            itemView.setOnClickListener {
 87→                if (isSafeClick(it)) {
 88→                    item.onSelected.invoke()
 89→                }
 90→            }
 91→        }
 92→
 93→        // Purpose of this method is to prevent 2 Editors
 94→        // from being launched simultaneously and then producing a crash
 95→        private fun isSafeClick(view: View): Boolean {
 96→            if (isClickEnabled.getAndSet(false)) {
 97→                view.postDelayed({
 98→                    isClickEnabled.set(true)
 99→                }, 1000)
100→                return true
101→            }
102→            return false
103→        }
104→    }
105→
106→    protected fun setBasicValues(data: PostListItemUiStateData) {
107→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(titleTextView, data.title)
108→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(excerptTextView, data.excerpt)
109→        updatePostInfoLabel(postInfoTextView, data.postInfo)
110→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(statusesTextView, data.statuses.isNotEmpty())
111→        updateStatusesLabel(statusesTextView, data.statuses, data.statusesDelimiter, data.statusesColor)
112→        showFeaturedImage(data.imageUrl)
113→        updateProgressBarState(data.progressBarUiState)
114→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(disabledOverlay, data.showOverlay)
115→        if (data.disableRippleEffect) {
116→            container.background = null
117→        } else {
118→            container.background = selectableBackground
119→        }
120→
121→        if ((data.title != null && data.title != noTitle) && data.excerpt != null) {
122→            titleTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
123→            excerptTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
124→            titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.addOnPreDrawListener(object : ViewTreeObserver.OnPreDrawListener {
125→                override fun onPreDraw(): Boolean {
126→                    // Remove the listener to avoid multiple callbacks
127→                    titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.removeOnPreDrawListener(this)
128→
129→                    // Get the layout of the title text
130→                    val titleLayout = titleTextView.layout
131→
132→                    // Check if the title occupies more than 2 lines
133→                    when (titleLayout.lineCount) {
134→                        1 -> {
135→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 2
136→                        }
137→                        else -> {
138→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 1
139→                            titleTextView.maxLines = 2
140→                        }
141→                    }
142→                    return true
143→                }
144→            })
145→        }
146→    }
147→
148→    protected fun setMoreActions(actions: List<PostListItemAction>) {
149→        moreButton.expandTouchTargetArea(R.dimen.post_list_more_button_extra_padding)
150→        moreButton.setOnClickListener { onMoreClicked(actions, moreButton) }
151→    }
152→
153→    private fun updatePostInfoLabel(view: TextView, uiStrings: List<UiString>?) {
154→        val concatenatedText = uiStrings?.joinToString(separator = "  ·  ") {
155→            uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it)
156→        }
157→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(view, concatenatedText)
158→    }
159→
160→    protected fun onMoreClicked(actions: List<PostListItemAction>, v: View) {
161→        val menu = PopupMenu(v.context, v)
162→        actions.forEach { singleItemAction ->
163→            val menuItem = menu.menu.add(
164→                Menu.NONE,
165→                singleItemAction.buttonType.value,
166→                Menu.NONE,
167→                getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(v.context, singleItemAction)
168→            )
169→            menuItem.setOnMenuItemClickListener {
170→                singleItemAction.onButtonClicked.invoke(singleItemAction.buttonType)
171→                true
172→            }
173→        }
174→        menu.show()
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun updateProgressBarState(progressBarUiState: ProgressBarUiState) {
178→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(uploadProgressBar, progressBarUiState.visibility)
179→        when (progressBarUiState) {
180→            is ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate -> uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = true
181→            is ProgressBarUiState.Determinate -> {
182→                uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = false
183→                uploadProgressBar.progress = progressBarUiState.progress
184→            }
185→            is ProgressBarUiState.Hidden -> Unit // Do nothing
186→        }
187→    }
188→
189→    private fun updateStatusesLabel(
190→        view: TextView,
191→        statuses: List<UiString>,
192→        delimiter: UiString,
193→        @ColorRes color: Int?
194→    ) {
195→        val separator = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, delimiter)
196→        view.text = statuses.joinToString(separator) { uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it) }
197→        color?.let { statusColor ->
198→            view.setTextColor(
199→                ContextCompat.getColor(
200→                    itemView.context,
201→                    statusColor
202→                )
203→            )
204→        }
205→    }
206→
207→    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
208→        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
209→            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
210→            return
211→        }
212→        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
213→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
214→            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
215→        } else {
216→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
217→            imageManager.loadImageWithCorners(
218→                featuredImageView,
219→                ImageType.PHOTO_ROUNDED_CORNERS,
220→                imageUrl,
221→                uiHelpers.getPxOfUiDimen(
222→                    WordPress.getContext(),
223→                    UiDimen.UIDimenRes(R.dimen.my_site_post_item_image_corner_radius)
224→                )
225→            )
226→        }
227→        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
228→    }
229→
230→    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
231→        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
232→        if (color != 0) {
233→            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
234→            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
235→        }
236→        return wrappedDrawable
237→    }
238→
239→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
240→    private fun getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(context: Context, item: PostListItemAction): SpannableStringBuilder {
241→        var icon: Drawable? = setTint(
242→            context,
243→            ContextCompat.getDrawable(context, item.buttonType.iconResId)!!, item.buttonType.colorAttrId
244→        )
245→        // If there's no icon, we insert a transparent one to keep the title aligned with the items which have icons.
246→        if (icon == null) icon = ColorDrawable(Color.TRANSPARENT)
247→        val iconSize: Int = context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_icon_size)
248→        icon.setBounds(0, 0, iconSize, iconSize)
249→        val imageSpan = ImageSpan(icon)
250→
251→        // Add a space placeholder for the icon, before the title.
252→        val menuTitle = context.getText(item.buttonType.textResId)
253→        val ssb = SpannableStringBuilder(
254→            menuTitle.padStart(menuTitle.length + POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING)
255→        )
256→
257→        // Replace the space placeholder with the icon.
258→        ssb.setSpan(imageSpan, 1, 2, 0)
259→        return ssb
260→    }
261→}
