1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.os.Bundle
  4→import android.text.TextUtils
  5→import android.view.LayoutInflater
  6→import android.view.View
  7→import android.view.ViewGroup
  8→import android.widget.Button
  9→import android.widget.ProgressBar
 10→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 11→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
 12→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager
 13→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
 14→import org.wordpress.android.R
 15→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActionableEmptyView
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ViewPagerFragment
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListType.SEARCH
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.adapters.PostListAdapter
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiHelpers
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 23→import org.wordpress.android.util.DisplayUtils
 24→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtils
 25→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
 26→import org.wordpress.android.util.WPSwipeToRefreshHelper.buildSwipeToRefreshHelper
 27→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableCompat
 28→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableExtraCompat
 29→import org.wordpress.android.util.helpers.SwipeToRefreshHelper
 30→import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageManager
 31→import org.wordpress.android.util.widgets.CustomSwipeRefreshLayout
 32→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PagedPostList
 33→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListEmptyUiState
 34→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemIdentifier.LocalPostId
 35→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListViewModel
 36→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.RecyclerItemDecoration
 37→import javax.inject.Inject
 38→
 39→private const val EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE = "post_list_type"
 40→private const val MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION = 2
 41→
 42→class PostListFragment : ViewPagerFragment() {
 43→    @Inject
 44→    internal lateinit var imageManager: ImageManager
 45→
 46→    @Inject
 47→    internal lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 48→
 49→    @Inject
 50→    internal lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 51→    private lateinit var viewModel: PostListViewModel
 52→    private lateinit var mainViewModel: PostListMainViewModel
 53→
 54→    private var swipeToRefreshHelper: SwipeToRefreshHelper? = null
 55→
 56→    private var swipeRefreshLayout: CustomSwipeRefreshLayout? = null
 57→    private var recyclerView: RecyclerView? = null
 58→    private var actionableEmptyView: ActionableEmptyView? = null
 59→    private var progressLoadMore: ProgressBar? = null
 60→
 61→    private lateinit var itemDecorationStandardLayout: RecyclerItemDecoration
 62→
 63→    private lateinit var postListType: PostListType
 64→
 65→    private lateinit var nonNullActivity: FragmentActivity
 66→
 67→    private val postListAdapter: PostListAdapter by lazy {
 68→        PostListAdapter(
 69→            context = nonNullActivity,
 70→            imageManager = imageManager,
 71→            uiHelpers = uiHelpers
 72→        )
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 76→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 77→        nonNullActivity = requireActivity()
 78→        (nonNullActivity.application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
 79→
 80→        val nonNullIntent = checkNotNull(nonNullActivity.intent)
 81→        val site = nonNullIntent.getSerializableExtraCompat<SiteModel>(WordPress.SITE)
 82→
 83→        if (site == null) {
 84→            ToastUtils.showToast(nonNullActivity, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
 85→            nonNullActivity.finish()
 86→        }
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun getScrollableViewForUniqueIdProvision(): View? {
 90→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
 91→            return null
 92→        }
 93→        return recyclerView
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 97→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 98→        postListType = requireNotNull(arguments?.getSerializableCompat(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE))
 99→
100→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
101→            recyclerView?.id = R.id.posts_search_recycler_view_id
102→        }
103→
104→        mainViewModel = ViewModelProvider(nonNullActivity, viewModelFactory)[PostListMainViewModel::class.java]
105→
106→        mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
107→            if (it != null) {
108→                if (viewModel.updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(it)) {
109→                    recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(0)
110→                }
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→        actionableEmptyView?.updateLayoutForSearch(postListType == SEARCH, 0)
115→
116→        val postListViewModelConnector = mainViewModel.getPostListViewModelConnector(postListType)
117→
118→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory)[PostListViewModel::class.java]
119→
120→        val displayWidth = DisplayUtils.getWindowPixelWidth(requireContext())
121→        val contentSpacing = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.content_margin)
122→
123→        // since the MainViewModel has been already started, we need to manually update the authorFilterSelection value
124→        viewModel.start(
125→            postListViewModelConnector,
126→            mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.value!!,
127→            photonWidth = displayWidth - contentSpacing * 2,
128→            photonHeight = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.reader_featured_image_height)
129→        )
130→
131→        initObservers()
132→    }
133→
134→    private fun initObservers() {
135→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
136→            mainViewModel.searchQuery.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
137→                if (TextUtils.isEmpty(it)) {
138→                    postListAdapter.submitList(null)
139→                }
140→                viewModel.search(it)
141→            }
142→        }
143→
144→        viewModel.emptyViewState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
145→            it?.let { emptyViewState -> updateEmptyViewForState(emptyViewState) }
146→        }
147→
148→        viewModel.isFetchingFirstPage.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
149→            swipeRefreshLayout?.isRefreshing = it == true
150→        }
151→
152→        viewModel.pagedListData.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
153→            it?.let { pagedListData -> updatePagedListData(pagedListData) }
154→        }
155→
156→        viewModel.isLoadingMore.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
157→            progressLoadMore?.visibility = if (it == true) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
158→        }
159→        viewModel.scrollToPosition.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
160→            it?.let { index ->
161→                recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(index)
162→            }
163→        }
164→    }
165→
166→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
167→        val view = inflater.inflate(R.layout.post_list_fragment, container, false)
168→
169→        swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById(R.id.ptr_layout)
170→        recyclerView = view.findViewById(R.id.recycler_view)
171→        progressLoadMore = view.findViewById(R.id.progress)
172→        actionableEmptyView = view.findViewById(R.id.actionable_empty_view)
173→
174→        val context = nonNullActivity
175→        itemDecorationStandardLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
176→            0,
177→            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_medium)
178→        )
179→        recyclerView?.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(context)
180→        recyclerView?.adapter = postListAdapter
181→        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
182→
183→        swipeRefreshLayout?.let {
184→            swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(it) {
185→                if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(nonNullActivity)) {
186→                    it.isRefreshing = false
187→                } else {
188→                    viewModel.swipeToRefresh()
189→                }
190→            }
191→        }
192→        return view
193→    }
194→
195→    /**
196→     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
197→     *
198→     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
199→     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
200→     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
201→     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
202→     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
203→     *
204→     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
205→     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
206→     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
207→     * after changes are reflected.
208→     */
209→    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
210→        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
211→        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
212→        recyclerView?.post {
213→            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
214→                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
215→                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
216→                }
217→            }
218→        }
219→    }
220→
221→    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
222→        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
223→            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
224→                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
225→                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
226→                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
227→                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
228→            } else {
229→                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
230→            }
231→        }
232→    }
233→
234→    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
235→        buttonView: Button,
236→        text: UiString?,
237→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
238→    ) {
239→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
240→        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
241→    }
242→
243→    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
244→        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
245→    }
246→
247→    companion object {
248→        const val TAG = "post_list_fragment_tag"
249→
250→        @JvmStatic
251→        fun newInstance(
252→            site: SiteModel,
253→            postListType: PostListType
254→        ): PostListFragment {
255→            val fragment = PostListFragment()
256→            val bundle = Bundle()
257→            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
258→            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
259→            fragment.arguments = bundle
260→            return fragment
261→        }
262→    }
263→}
264→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.R
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.PRIVATE
 6→
 7→enum class PostListType(val postStatuses: List<PostStatus>) {
 8→    PUBLISHED(listOf(PostStatus.PUBLISHED, PRIVATE)),
 9→    DRAFTS(listOf(PostStatus.DRAFT, PostStatus.PENDING)),
10→    SCHEDULED(listOf(PostStatus.SCHEDULED)),
11→    TRASHED(listOf(PostStatus.TRASHED)),
12→    SEARCH(
13→        listOf(
14→            PostStatus.DRAFT,
15→            PostStatus.PENDING,
16→            PostStatus.PUBLISHED,
17→            PRIVATE,
18→            PostStatus.SCHEDULED,
19→            PostStatus.TRASHED
20→        )
21→    );
22→
23→    val titleResId: Int
24→        get() = when (this) {
25→            PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_list_tab_published_posts
26→            DRAFTS -> R.string.post_list_tab_drafts
27→            SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_list_tab_scheduled_posts
28→            TRASHED -> R.string.post_list_tab_trashed_posts
29→            SEARCH -> 0 // we don't have title for search list
30→        }
31→
32→    companion object {
33→        fun fromPostStatus(status: PostStatus): PostListType {
34→            return when (status) {
35→                PostStatus.PUBLISHED, PRIVATE -> PUBLISHED
36→                PostStatus.DRAFT, PostStatus.PENDING, PostStatus.UNKNOWN -> DRAFTS
37→                PostStatus.TRASHED -> TRASHED
38→                PostStatus.SCHEDULED -> SCHEDULED
39→            }
40→        }
41→    }
42→}
43→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker.Stat
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 6→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsUtils
 7→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType
 8→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD
 9→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_COPY
10→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_COPY_URL
11→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_DELETE
12→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY
13→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_EDIT
14→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_MORE
15→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT
16→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_PREVIEW
17→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_PUBLISH
18→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_RETRY
19→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG
20→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_STATS
21→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_SUBMIT
22→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_SYNC
23→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_TRASH
24→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_VIEW
25→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButtonType.BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE
26→
27→fun trackPostListAction(site: SiteModel, buttonType: PostListButtonType, postData: PostModel, statsEvent: Stat) {
28→    val properties = HashMap<String, Any?>()
29→    if (!postData.isLocalDraft) {
30→        properties["post_id"] = postData.remotePostId
31→    }
32→
33→    properties["action"] = when (buttonType) {
34→        BUTTON_EDIT -> {
35→            properties[AnalyticsUtils.HAS_GUTENBERG_BLOCKS_KEY] = PostUtils
36→                .contentContainsGutenbergBlocks(postData.content)
37→            "edit"
38→        }
39→        BUTTON_RETRY -> "retry"
40→        BUTTON_SUBMIT -> "submit"
41→        BUTTON_VIEW -> "view"
42→        BUTTON_PREVIEW -> "preview"
43→        BUTTON_STATS -> "stats"
44→        BUTTON_TRASH -> "trash"
45→        BUTTON_COPY -> "copy"
46→        BUTTON_DELETE,
47→        BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> "delete"
48→        BUTTON_PUBLISH -> "publish"
49→        BUTTON_SYNC -> "sync"
50→        BUTTON_MORE -> "more"
51→        BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> "move_to_draft"
52→        BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD -> "cancel_pending_auto_upload"
53→        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG -> "show_move_trashed_post_to_draft_post_dialog"
54→        BUTTON_COPY_URL -> "copy_url"
55→        BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> "promote_with_blaze"
56→    }
57→
58→    AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(statsEvent, site, properties)
59→}
60→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import org.wordpress.android.R
  4→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker.Stat.UNPUBLISHED_REVISION_DIALOG_LOAD_LOCAL_VERSION_CLICKED
  5→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker.Stat.UNPUBLISHED_REVISION_DIALOG_LOAD_UNPUBLISHED_VERSION_CLICKED
  6→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker.Stat.UNPUBLISHED_REVISION_DIALOG_SHOWN
  7→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 10→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 11→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.helpers.DialogHolder
 12→
 13→private const val CONFIRM_DELETE_POST_DIALOG_TAG = "CONFIRM_DELETE_POST_DIALOG_TAG"
 14→private const val CONFIRM_RESTORE_TRASHED_POST_DIALOG_TAG = "CONFIRM_RESTORE_TRASHED_POST_DIALOG_TAG"
 15→private const val CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_LOCAL_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG = "CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_LOCAL_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG"
 16→private const val CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_UNSAVED_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG =
 17→    "CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_UNSAVED_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG"
 18→private const val CONFIRM_ON_CONFLICT_LOAD_REMOTE_POST_DIALOG_TAG = "CONFIRM_ON_CONFLICT_LOAD_REMOTE_POST_DIALOG_TAG"
 19→private const val CONFIRM_ON_AUTOSAVE_REVISION_DIALOG_TAG = "CONFIRM_ON_AUTOSAVE_REVISION_DIALOG_TAG"
 20→private const val CONFIRM_SYNC_SCHEDULED_POST_DIALOG_TAG = "CONFIRM_SYNC_SCHEDULED_POST_DIALOG_TAG"
 21→private const val COPY_CONFLICT_DIALOG_TAG = "COPY_CONFLICT_DIALOG_TAG"
 22→private const val POST_TYPE = "post_type"
 23→
 24→/**
 25→ * This is a temporary class to make the PostListViewModel more manageable. Please feel free to refactor it any way
 26→ * you see fit.
 27→ */
 28→class PostListDialogHelper(
 29→    private val showDialog: (DialogHolder) -> Unit,
 30→    private val checkNetworkConnection: () -> Boolean,
 31→    private val analyticsTracker: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 32→) {
 33→    // Since we are using DialogFragments we need to hold onto which post will be published or trashed / resolved
 34→    private var localPostIdForDeleteDialog: Int? = null
 35→    private var localPostIdForMoveTrashedPostToDraftDialog: Int? = null
 36→    private var localPostIdForTrashPostWithLocalChangesDialog: Int? = null
 37→    private var localPostIdForTrashPostWithUnsavedChangesDialog: Int? = null
 38→    private var localPostIdForConflictResolutionDialog: Int? = null
 39→    private var localPostIdForAutosaveRevisionResolutionDialog: Int? = null
 40→    private var localPostIdForScheduledPostSyncDialog: Int? = null
 41→    private var localPostIdForCopyConflictDialog: Int? = null
 42→
 43→    fun showMoveTrashedPostToDraftDialog(post: PostModel) {
 44→        val dialogHolder = DialogHolder(
 45→            tag = CONFIRM_RESTORE_TRASHED_POST_DIALOG_TAG,
 46→            title = UiStringRes(R.string.post_list_move_trashed_post_to_draft_dialog_title),
 47→            message = UiStringRes(R.string.post_list_move_trashed_post_to_draft_dialog_message),
 48→            positiveButton = UiStringRes(R.string.post_list_move_trashed_post_to_draft_dialog_positive),
 49→            negativeButton = UiStringRes(R.string.post_list_move_trashed_post_to_draft_dialog_negative)
 50→        )
 51→        localPostIdForMoveTrashedPostToDraftDialog = post.id
 52→        showDialog.invoke(dialogHolder)
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    fun showDeletePostConfirmationDialog(post: PostModel) {
 56→        // We need network connection to delete a remote post, but not a local draft
 57→        if (!post.isLocalDraft && !checkNetworkConnection.invoke()) {
 58→            return
 59→        }
 60→        val dialogHolder = DialogHolder(
 61→            tag = CONFIRM_DELETE_POST_DIALOG_TAG,
 62→            title = UiStringRes(R.string.delete_post),
 63→            message = UiStringRes(R.string.dialog_confirm_delete_permanently_post),
 64→            positiveButton = UiStringRes(R.string.delete),
 65→            negativeButton = UiStringRes(R.string.cancel)
 66→        )
 67→        localPostIdForDeleteDialog = post.id
 68→        showDialog.invoke(dialogHolder)
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    fun showSyncScheduledPostConfirmationDialog(post: PostModel) {
 72→        if (localPostIdForScheduledPostSyncDialog != null) {
 73→            // We can only handle one sync post dialog at once
 74→            return
 75→        }
 76→        val dialogHolder = DialogHolder(
 77→            tag = CONFIRM_SYNC_SCHEDULED_POST_DIALOG_TAG,
 78→            title = UiStringRes(R.string.dialog_confirm_scheduled_post_sync_title),
 79→            message = UiStringRes(R.string.dialog_confirm_scheduled_post_sync_message),
 80→            positiveButton = UiStringRes(R.string.dialog_confirm_scheduled_post_sync_yes),
 81→            negativeButton = UiStringRes(R.string.cancel)
 82→        )
 83→        localPostIdForScheduledPostSyncDialog = post.id
 84→        showDialog.invoke(dialogHolder)
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    fun showTrashPostWithLocalChangesConfirmationDialog(post: PostModel) {
 88→        if (!checkNetworkConnection.invoke()) {
 89→            return
 90→        }
 91→        val dialogHolder = DialogHolder(
 92→            tag = CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_LOCAL_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG,
 93→            title = UiStringRes(R.string.dialog_confirm_trash_losing_local_changes_title),
 94→            message = UiStringRes(R.string.dialog_confirm_trash_losing_local_changes_message),
 95→            positiveButton = UiStringRes(R.string.dialog_button_ok),
 96→            negativeButton = UiStringRes(R.string.dialog_button_cancel)
 97→        )
 98→        localPostIdForTrashPostWithLocalChangesDialog = post.id
 99→        showDialog.invoke(dialogHolder)
100→    }
101→
102→    fun showTrashPostWithUnsavedChangesConfirmationDialog(post: PostModel) {
103→        if (!checkNetworkConnection.invoke()) {
104→            return
105→        }

153→
154→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
155→    fun onPositiveClickedForBasicDialog(
156→        instanceTag: String,
157→        trashPostWithLocalChanges: (Int) -> Unit,
158→        trashPostWithUnsavedChanges: (Int) -> Unit,
159→        deletePost: (Int) -> Unit,
160→        publishPost: (Int) -> Unit,
161→        updateConflictedPostWithRemoteVersion: (Int) -> Unit,
162→        editRestoredAutoSavePost: (Int) -> Unit,
163→        moveTrashedPostToDraft: (Int) -> Unit,
164→        resolveConflictsAndEditPost: (Int) -> Unit
165→    ) {
166→        when (instanceTag) {
167→            CONFIRM_DELETE_POST_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForDeleteDialog?.let {
168→                localPostIdForDeleteDialog = null
169→                deletePost(it)
170→            }
171→            CONFIRM_SYNC_SCHEDULED_POST_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForScheduledPostSyncDialog?.let {
172→                localPostIdForScheduledPostSyncDialog = null
173→                publishPost(it)
174→            }
175→            CONFIRM_ON_CONFLICT_LOAD_REMOTE_POST_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForConflictResolutionDialog?.let {
176→                localPostIdForConflictResolutionDialog = null
177→                // here load version from remote
178→                updateConflictedPostWithRemoteVersion(it)
179→            }
180→            CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_LOCAL_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForTrashPostWithLocalChangesDialog?.let {
181→                localPostIdForTrashPostWithLocalChangesDialog = null
182→                trashPostWithLocalChanges(it)
183→            }
184→            CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_UNSAVED_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForTrashPostWithUnsavedChangesDialog?.let {
185→                localPostIdForTrashPostWithUnsavedChangesDialog = null
186→                trashPostWithUnsavedChanges(it)
187→            }
188→            CONFIRM_RESTORE_TRASHED_POST_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForMoveTrashedPostToDraftDialog?.let {
189→                localPostIdForMoveTrashedPostToDraftDialog = null
190→                moveTrashedPostToDraft(it)
191→            }
192→            CONFIRM_ON_AUTOSAVE_REVISION_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForAutosaveRevisionResolutionDialog?.let {
193→                // open the editor with the restored auto save
194→                localPostIdForAutosaveRevisionResolutionDialog = null
195→                editRestoredAutoSavePost(it)
196→                analyticsTracker.track(
197→                    UNPUBLISHED_REVISION_DIALOG_LOAD_UNPUBLISHED_VERSION_CLICKED,
198→                    mapOf(POST_TYPE to "post")
199→                )
200→            }
201→            COPY_CONFLICT_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForCopyConflictDialog?.let {
202→                localPostIdForCopyConflictDialog = null
203→                resolveConflictsAndEditPost(it)
204→            }
205→            else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Dialog's positive button click is not handled: $instanceTag")
206→        }
207→    }
208→
209→    fun onNegativeClickedForBasicDialog(
210→        instanceTag: String,
211→        updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion: (Int) -> Unit,
212→        editLocalPost: (Int) -> Unit,
213→        copyLocalPost: (Int) -> Unit
214→    ) {
215→        when (instanceTag) {
216→            CONFIRM_DELETE_POST_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForDeleteDialog = null
217→            CONFIRM_SYNC_SCHEDULED_POST_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForScheduledPostSyncDialog = null
218→            CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_LOCAL_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForTrashPostWithLocalChangesDialog = null
219→            CONFIRM_TRASH_POST_WITH_UNSAVED_CHANGES_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForTrashPostWithUnsavedChangesDialog = null
220→            CONFIRM_ON_CONFLICT_LOAD_REMOTE_POST_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForConflictResolutionDialog?.let {
221→                updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion(it)
222→            }
223→            CONFIRM_ON_AUTOSAVE_REVISION_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForAutosaveRevisionResolutionDialog?.let {
224→                // open the editor with the local post (don't use the auto save version)
225→                editLocalPost(it)
226→                analyticsTracker.track(
227→                    UNPUBLISHED_REVISION_DIALOG_LOAD_LOCAL_VERSION_CLICKED,
228→                    mapOf(POST_TYPE to "post")
229→                )
230→            }
231→            CONFIRM_RESTORE_TRASHED_POST_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForMoveTrashedPostToDraftDialog = null
232→            COPY_CONFLICT_DIALOG_TAG -> localPostIdForCopyConflictDialog?.let {
233→                localPostIdForCopyConflictDialog = null
234→                copyLocalPost(it)
235→            }
236→            else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Dialog's negative button click is not handled: $instanceTag")
237→        }
238→    }
239→
240→    fun onDismissByOutsideTouchForBasicDialog(
241→        instanceTag: String,
242→        updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion: (Int) -> Unit,
243→        editLocalPost: (Int) -> Unit,
244→        copyLocalPost: (Int) -> Unit
245→    ) {
246→        // Cancel and outside touch dismiss works the same way for all, except for conflict and autosave revision
247→        // dialogs, for which tapping outside and actively tapping the "edit local" have different meanings
248→        if (instanceTag != CONFIRM_ON_CONFLICT_LOAD_REMOTE_POST_DIALOG_TAG &&
249→            instanceTag != CONFIRM_ON_AUTOSAVE_REVISION_DIALOG_TAG
250→        ) {
251→            onNegativeClickedForBasicDialog(
252→                instanceTag = instanceTag,
253→                updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion = updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion,
254→                editLocalPost = editLocalPost,
255→                copyLocalPost = copyLocalPost
256→            )
257→        }
258→    }
259→}

 48→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.helpers.ConnectionStatus
 49→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListEmptyUiState.RefreshError
 50→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemIdentifier.LocalPostId
 51→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemType.PostListItemUiState
 52→import javax.inject.Inject
 53→import javax.inject.Named
 54→import kotlin.properties.Delegates
 55→
 56→typealias PagedPostList = PagedList<PostListItemType>
 57→
 58→private const val SEARCH_DELAY_MS = 500L
 59→private const val SEARCH_PROGRESS_INDICATOR_DELAY_MS = 500L
 60→private const val EMPTY_VIEW_THROTTLE = 250L
 61→
 62→class PostListViewModel @Inject constructor(
 63→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 64→    private val listStore: ListStore,
 65→    private val postStore: PostStore,
 66→    private val accountStore: AccountStore,
 67→    private val listItemUiStateHelper: PostListItemUiStateHelper,
 68→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 69→    private val uploadStarter: UploadStarter,
 70→    private val readerUtilsWrapper: ReaderUtilsWrapper,
 71→    private val uploadUtilsWrapper: UploadUtilsWrapper,
 72→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val uiDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 73→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 74→    connectionStatus: LiveData<ConnectionStatus>
 75→) : ScopedViewModel(uiDispatcher) {
 76→    private val isStatsSupported: Boolean by lazy {
 77→        SiteUtils.isAccessedViaWPComRest(connector.site) && connector.site.hasCapabilityViewStats
 78→    }
 79→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {
 80→        connector.site.isWPCom &&
 81→                connector.site.hasCapabilityEditOthersPosts &&
 82→                !connector.site.isSingleUserSite
 83→    }
 84→    private var isStarted: Boolean = false
 85→    private lateinit var connector: PostListViewModelConnector
 86→
 87→    private var photonWidth by Delegates.notNull<Int>()
 88→    private var photonHeight by Delegates.notNull<Int>()
 89→
 90→    private var scrollToLocalPostId: LocalPostId? = null
 91→
 92→    private val _scrollToPosition = SingleLiveEvent<Int>()
 93→    val scrollToPosition: LiveData<Int> = _scrollToPosition
 94→
 95→    private val dataSource: PostListItemDataSource by lazy {
 96→        PostListItemDataSource(
 97→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
 98→            postStore = postStore,
 99→            postFetcher = connector.postFetcher,
100→            transform = this::transformPostModelToPostListItemUiState
101→        )
102→    }
103→
104→    private var pagedListWrapper: PagedListWrapper<PostListItemType>? = null
105→
106→    private val _pagedListData = MediatorLiveData<PagedPostList>()
107→    val pagedListData: LiveData<PagedPostList> = _pagedListData
108→
109→    private val _emptyViewState = ThrottleLiveData<PostListEmptyUiState>(
110→        offset = EMPTY_VIEW_THROTTLE,
111→        coroutineScope = viewModelScope,
112→        mainDispatcher = uiDispatcher,
113→        backgroundDispatcher = bgDispatcher
114→    )
115→    val emptyViewState: LiveData<PostListEmptyUiState> = _emptyViewState
116→
117→    private val _isLoadingMore = MediatorLiveData<Boolean>()
118→    val isLoadingMore: LiveData<Boolean> = _isLoadingMore
119→
120→    private val _isFetchingFirstPage = MediatorLiveData<Boolean>()
121→    val isFetchingFirstPage: LiveData<Boolean> = _isFetchingFirstPage
122→
123→    private var searchQuery: String? = null
124→    private var searchJob: Job? = null
125→    private var searchProgressJob: Job? = null
126→    private lateinit var authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection
127→
128→    private val lifecycleOwner = object : LifecycleOwner {
129→        val lifecycleRegistry = LifecycleRegistry(this)
130→        override val lifecycle: Lifecycle = lifecycleRegistry
131→    }
132→
133→    fun start(
134→        postListViewModelConnector: PostListViewModelConnector,
135→        value: AuthorFilterSelection,
136→        photonWidth: Int,
137→        photonHeight: Int
138→    ) {
139→        if (isStarted) {
140→            return
141→        }
142→        this.photonHeight = photonHeight
143→        this.photonWidth = photonWidth
144→        connector = postListViewModelConnector
145→
146→        isStarted = true
147→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED
148→
149→        if (connector.postListType == SEARCH) {
150→            this.authorFilterSelection = EVERYONE
151→        } else {
152→            this.authorFilterSelection = value
153→            /*
154→             * We don't want to initialize the list with empty search query in search mode as it'd send an unnecessary
155→             * request to fetch ids of all posts on the site.
156→             */
157→            initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
158→        }
159→    }
160→
161→    private fun initList(dataSource: PostListItemDataSource, lifecycle: Lifecycle) {
162→        val listDescriptor: PostListDescriptor = initListDescriptor(searchQuery)
163→
164→        clearLiveDataSources()
165→
166→        val pagedListWrapper = listStore.getList(listDescriptor, dataSource, lifecycle)
167→
168→        listenToEmptyViewStateLiveData(pagedListWrapper)
169→
170→        _pagedListData.addSource(pagedListWrapper.data) { pagedPostList ->
171→            pagedPostList?.let {
172→                if (isSearchResultDeliverable()) {
173→                    onDataUpdated(it)
174→                    _pagedListData.value = it
175→                }
176→            }
177→        }
178→        _isFetchingFirstPage.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage) {
179→            searchProgressJob?.cancel()
180→            if (it == true) {
181→                val delay = if (connector.postListType != SEARCH) {
182→                    0
183→                } else {
184→                    SEARCH_PROGRESS_INDICATOR_DELAY_MS
185→                }
186→                searchProgressJob = launch {
187→                    delay(delay)
188→                    searchProgressJob = null
189→                    if (isActive) {
190→                        _isFetchingFirstPage.value = true
191→                    }
192→                }
193→            } else {
194→                _isFetchingFirstPage.value = false
195→            }
196→        }
197→        _isLoadingMore.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isLoadingMore) {
198→            _isLoadingMore.value = it
199→        }
200→
201→        this.pagedListWrapper = pagedListWrapper
202→        fetchFirstPage()
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun clearLiveDataSources() {
206→        pagedListWrapper?.let {
207→            _pagedListData.removeSource(it.data)
208→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(pagedListData)
209→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.isEmpty)
210→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.isFetchingFirstPage)
211→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.listError)
212→            _isFetchingFirstPage.removeSource(it.isFetchingFirstPage)
213→            _isLoadingMore.removeSource(it.isLoadingMore)
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun initListDescriptor(searchQuery: String?): PostListDescriptor {
218→        return if (connector.site.isUsingWpComRestApi) {
219→            val author: AuthorFilter = when (authorFilterSelection) {
220→                ME -> SpecificAuthor(accountStore.account.userId)
221→                EVERYONE -> Everyone
222→            }
223→
224→            PostListDescriptorForRestSite(
225→                site = connector.site,
226→                statusList = connector.postListType.postStatuses,
227→                author = author,
228→                searchQuery = searchQuery,
229→                order = if (connector.postListType == SCHEDULED) ListOrder.ASC else ListOrder.DESC
230→            )
231→        } else {
232→            PostListDescriptorForXmlRpcSite(
233→                site = connector.site,
234→                statusList = connector.postListType.postStatuses,
235→                searchQuery = searchQuery,
236→                order = if (connector.postListType == SCHEDULED) ListOrder.ASC else ListOrder.DESC
237→            )
238→        }
239→    }
240→
241→    private fun listenToEmptyViewStateLiveData(pagedListWrapper: PagedListWrapper<PostListItemType>) {
242→        val update = {
243→            createEmptyUiState(
244→                postListType = connector.postListType,
245→                isNetworkAvailable = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable(),
246→                isLoadingData = pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage.value ?: false ||
247→                        pagedListWrapper.data.value == null,
248→                isListEmpty = pagedListWrapper.isEmpty.value ?: true,
249→                isSearchPromptRequired = isEmptySearch(),
250→                error = pagedListWrapper.listError.value,
251→                fetchFirstPage = this::fetchFirstPage,
252→                newPost = connector.postActionHandler::newPost
253→            )
254→        }
255→
256→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isEmpty) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
257→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
258→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.listError) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
259→    }
260→
261→    // used to filter out dataset changes that might trigger empty view when performing search
262→    private fun isSearchResultDeliverable(): Boolean {
263→        return connector.postListType != SEARCH ||
264→                (connector.postListType == SEARCH &&
265→                        pagedListWrapper?.isFetchingFirstPage?.value != null &&
266→                        isFetchingFirstPage.value == false)
267→    }
268→
269→    private fun isEmptySearch(): Boolean {
270→        return TextUtils.isEmpty(searchQuery) && connector.postListType == SEARCH
271→    }
272→
273→    init {
274→        connectionStatus.observe(lifecycleOwner, Observer {
275→            retryOnConnectionAvailableAfterRefreshError()
276→        })
277→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.CREATED
278→    }
279→
280→    fun search(query: String?, delay: Long = SEARCH_DELAY_MS) {
281→        if (searchQuery == query) {
282→            return
283→        }
284→        searchJob?.cancel()
285→        searchProgressJob?.cancel()
286→        searchQuery = query
287→        if (TextUtils.isEmpty(query)) {
288→            clearLiveDataSources()
289→            pagedListWrapper = null
290→            _isFetchingFirstPage.value = false
291→            showEmptySearchPrompt()
292→        } else {
293→            searchJob = launch {
294→                delay(delay)
295→                searchJob = null
296→                if (isActive) {
297→                    initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
298→                }
299→            }
300→        }
301→    }
302→
303→    private fun showEmptySearchPrompt() {
304→        _emptyViewState.value = createEmptyUiState(
305→            postListType = SEARCH,
306→            isNetworkAvailable = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable(),
307→            isLoadingData = false,
308→            isListEmpty = true,
309→            isSearchPromptRequired = true,
310→            error = null,
311→            fetchFirstPage = this@PostListViewModel::fetchFirstPage,
312→            newPost = connector.postActionHandler::newPost
313→        )
314→    }
315→
316→    override fun onCleared() {
317→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.DESTROYED
318→        super.onCleared()
319→    }
320→
321→    // Public Methods
322→
323→    fun swipeToRefresh() {
324→        uploadStarter.queueUploadFromSite(connector.site)
325→        fetchFirstPage()
326→    }
327→
328→    fun scrollToPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
329→        val data = pagedListData.value
330→        if (data != null) {
331→            updateScrollPosition(data, localPostId)
332→        } else {
333→            // store the target post id and scroll there when the data is loaded
334→            scrollToLocalPostId = localPostId
335→        }
336→    }
337→
338→    // Utils
339→
340→    private fun fetchFirstPage() {
341→        pagedListWrapper?.fetchFirstPage()
342→    }
343→
344→    private fun onDataUpdated(data: PagedPostList) {
345→        val localPostId = scrollToLocalPostId
346→        if (localPostId != null) {
347→            scrollToLocalPostId = null
348→            updateScrollPosition(data, localPostId)
349→        }
350→    }
351→
352→    private fun updateScrollPosition(data: PagedPostList, localPostId: LocalPostId) {
353→        val position = findItemListPosition(data, localPostId)
354→        position?.let {
355→            _scrollToPosition.value = it
356→        } ?: AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, "ScrollToPost failed - the post not found.")
357→    }
358→
359→    private fun findItemListPosition(data: PagedPostList, localPostId: LocalPostId): Int? {
360→        return data.listIterator().withIndex().asSequence().find { listItem ->
361→            if (listItem.value is PostListItemUiState) {
362→                (listItem.value as PostListItemUiState).data.localPostId == localPostId
363→            } else {
364→                false
365→            }
366→        }?.index
367→    }
368→
369→    private fun transformPostModelToPostListItemUiState(post: PostModel): PostListItemUiState {
370→        val hasAutoSave = connector.hasAutoSave(post)
371→        return listItemUiStateHelper.createPostListItemUiState(
372→            authorFilterSelection,
373→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported,
374→            post = post,
375→            site = connector.site,
376→            unhandledConflicts = connector.doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict(post),
377→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave,
378→            capabilitiesToPublish = uploadUtilsWrapper.userCanPublish(connector.site),
379→            statsSupported = isStatsSupported,
380→            featuredImageUrl =
381→            convertToPhotonUrlIfPossible(connector.getFeaturedImageUrl(post.featuredImageId)),
382→            formattedDate = PostUtils.getFormattedDate(post),
383→            performingCriticalAction = connector.postActionHandler.isPerformingCriticalAction(LocalId(post.id)),
384→            onAction = { postModel, buttonType, statEvent ->
385→                trackPostListAction(connector.site, buttonType, postModel, statEvent)
386→                connector.postActionHandler.handlePostButton(buttonType, postModel, hasAutoSave)
387→            },
388→            uploadStatusTracker = connector.uploadStatusTracker,
389→            isSearch = connector.postListType == SEARCH
390→        )
391→    }

393→    private fun retryOnConnectionAvailableAfterRefreshError() {
394→        val connectionAvailableAfterRefreshError = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable() &&
395→                emptyViewState.value is RefreshError
396→
397→        if (connectionAvailableAfterRefreshError) {
398→            fetchFirstPage()
399→        }
400→    }
401→
402→    private fun convertToPhotonUrlIfPossible(featuredImageUrl: String?): String? =
403→        readerUtilsWrapper.getResizedImageUrl(
404→            featuredImageUrl,
405→            photonWidth,
406→            photonHeight,
407→            SiteUtils.getAccessibilityInfoFromSite(connector.site)
408→        )

410→    fun updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection): Boolean {
411→        if (connector.postListType != SEARCH && this.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
412→            this.authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection
413→            initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
414→            return true
415→        }
416→        return false
417→    }

1→package org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages
  2→
  3→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteHomepageSettings.ShowOnFront
  4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action
  6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD
  7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.COPY
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.COPY_LINK
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.DELETE_PERMANENTLY
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.MOVE_TO_DRAFT
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.MOVE_TO_TRASH
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.PUBLISH_NOW
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.SET_AS_HOMEPAGE
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.SET_AS_POSTS_PAGE
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.SET_PARENT
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.PageItem.Action.VIEW_PAGE
 18→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType
 19→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType.DRAFTS
 20→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType.PUBLISHED
 21→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType.SCHEDULED
 22→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PageListViewModel.PageListType.TRASHED
 23→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase.PostUploadUiState
 24→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase.PostUploadUiState.UploadFailed
 25→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.pages.PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase.PostUploadUiState.UploadWaitingForConnection
 26→import javax.inject.Inject
 27→
 28→class CreatePageListItemActionsUseCase @Inject constructor() {
 29→    @SuppressWarnings("ReturnCount")
 30→    fun setupPageActions(
 31→        listType: PageListType,
 32→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
 33→        siteModel: SiteModel,
 34→        remoteId: Long,
 35→        isPageEligibleForBlaze: Boolean = false
 36→    ): Set<Action> {
 37→        return when (listType) {
 38→            SCHEDULED -> return getScheduledPageActions(uploadUiState)
 39→            PUBLISHED -> return getPublishedPageActions(
 40→                siteModel,
 41→                remoteId,
 42→                listType,
 43→                uploadUiState,
 44→                isPageEligibleForBlaze
 45→            )
 46→            DRAFTS -> getDraftsPageActions(uploadUiState)
 47→            TRASHED -> setOf(MOVE_TO_DRAFT, DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
 48→        }
 49→    }
 50→
 51→    private fun getScheduledPageActions(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState): MutableSet<Action> {
 52→        return mutableSetOf(
 53→            VIEW_PAGE,
 54→            SET_PARENT,
 55→            COPY_LINK,
 56→            MOVE_TO_DRAFT,
 57→            MOVE_TO_TRASH
 58→        ).apply {
 59→            if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload(uploadUiState)) {
 60→                add(CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD)
 61→            }
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun canCancelPendingAutoUpload(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState) =
 66→        (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
 67→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
 68→
 69→    private fun getPublishedPageActions(
 70→        siteModel: SiteModel,
 71→        remoteId: Long,
 72→        listType: PageListType,
 73→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
 74→        isPageEligibleForBlaze: Boolean
 75→    ): MutableSet<Action> {
 76→        return mutableSetOf(
 77→            VIEW_PAGE,
 78→            COPY,
 79→            COPY_LINK,
 80→            SET_PARENT
 81→        ).apply {
 82→            if (siteModel.isUsingWpComRestApi &&
 83→                siteModel.showOnFront == ShowOnFront.PAGE.value &&
 84→                remoteId > 0
 85→            ) {
 86→                if (siteModel.pageOnFront != remoteId) {
 87→                    add(SET_AS_HOMEPAGE)
 88→                }
 89→                if (siteModel.pageForPosts != remoteId) {
 90→                    add(SET_AS_POSTS_PAGE)
 91→                }
 92→            }
 93→
 94→            if (siteModel.pageOnFront != remoteId && listType == PUBLISHED) {
 95→                add(MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
 96→                add(MOVE_TO_TRASH)
 97→            }
 98→
 99→            if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload(uploadUiState)) {
100→                add(CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD)
101→            }
102→
103→            if (isPageEligibleForBlaze) {
104→                add(PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
105→            }
106→        }
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun getDraftsPageActions(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState): MutableSet<Action> {
110→        return mutableSetOf(VIEW_PAGE, SET_PARENT, PUBLISH_NOW, MOVE_TO_TRASH, COPY, COPY_LINK).apply {
111→            if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload(uploadUiState)) {
112→                add(CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD)
113→            }
114→        }
115→    }
116→}

70→ * Helper class which encapsulates logic for creating UiStates for items in the PostsList.
 71→ */
 72→class PostListItemUiStateHelper @Inject constructor(
 73→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 74→    private val uploadUiStateUseCase: PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase,
 75→    private val labelColorUseCase: PostPageListLabelColorUseCase,
 76→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
 77→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 78→) {
 79→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "LongMethod")
 80→    fun createPostListItemUiState(
 81→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
 82→        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
 83→        post: PostModel,
 84→        site: SiteModel,
 85→        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
 86→        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
 87→        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
 88→        statsSupported: Boolean,
 89→        featuredImageUrl: String?,
 90→        formattedDate: String,
 91→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
 92→        isSearch: Boolean,
 93→        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
 94→        postListType: PostListType,
 95→        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
 96→    ): PostListItemUiState {
 97→        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
 98→        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)
 99→
100→        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
101→            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
102→        }
103→        val moreActions = createMoreActions(
104→            postStatus = postStatus,
105→            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
106→            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
107→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
108→            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
109→            statsSupported = statsSupported,
110→            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
111→            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
112→            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
113→                site,
114→                postStatus,
115→                post
116→            ),
117→            postListType = postListType,
118→            onButtonClicked = onButtonClicked
119→        )
120→
121→        val remotePostId = RemotePostId(RemoteId(post.remotePostId))
122→        val localPostId = LocalPostId(LocalId(post.id))
123→        val baseTitle = getTitle(post = post)
124→        val excerpt = getExcerpt(post = post)
125→
126→        val title =
127→            if (baseTitle == UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses) && excerpt != null) null else baseTitle
128→
129→        val postInfo = getPostInfoLabels(
130→            postStatus,
131→            formattedDate,
132→            post.authorDisplayName,
133→            authorFilterSelection,
134→            isSearch,
135→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported
136→        )
137→        val statuses = getStatuses(
138→            postStatus = postStatus,
139→            post = post,
140→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
141→            hasUnhandledConflicts = unhandledConflicts,
142→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave
143→        )
144→        val statusesColor = labelColorUseCase.getLabelsColor(post, uploadUiState, unhandledConflicts, hasAutoSave)
145→        val statusesDelimiter = UiStringRes(R.string.multiple_status_label_delimiter)
146→        val onSelected = {
147→            when (postStatus) {
148→                TRASHED -> {
149→                    onAction.invoke(
150→                        post,
151→                        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG,
152→                        POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
153→                    )
154→                }
155→
156→                UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED, DRAFT, PRIVATE, PENDING, SCHEDULED -> onAction.invoke(
157→                    post,
158→                    BUTTON_EDIT,
159→                    POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
160→                )
161→            }
162→        }
163→        val itemUiData = PostListItemUiStateData(
164→            remotePostId = remotePostId,
165→            localPostId = localPostId,
166→            title = title,
167→            excerpt = excerpt,
168→            imageUrl = featuredImageUrl,
169→            postInfo = postInfo,
170→            statuses = statuses,
171→            statusesColor = statusesColor,
172→            statusesDelimiter = statusesDelimiter,
173→            progressBarUiState = getProgressBarState(
174→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
175→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
176→            ),
177→            showOverlay = shouldShowOverlay(
178→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
179→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
180→            ),
181→            disableRippleEffect = postStatus == TRASHED
182→        )
183→
184→        return PostListItemUiState(
185→            data = itemUiData,
186→            moreActions = moreActions,
187→            onSelected = onSelected
188→        )
189→    }
